english: Our train arrived at Tokyo Station.
japanese: 私たちの列車は東京駅に着いた。

english: The President arrived at Tokyo.
japanese: 大統領は東京に到着した。

english: He threw a ball at me.
japanese: 彼は私にボールを投げた。

english: My husband is still at work.
japanese: 夫はまだ仕事中です。

english: I called at his office yesterday.
japanese: 私は昨日彼の事務所に立ち寄った。

english: She's smiling at me.
japanese: 彼女は私にほほえみかけている。

english: Don't laugh at me.
japanese: 私を笑わないで。

english: He glanced at his watch.
japanese: 彼はちらっと腕時計を見た。

english: Why are you staring at me?
japanese: どうして私をじっと見ているの。

english: She gazed at the diamond ring.
japanese: 彼女はそのダイヤの指輪を見つめた。

english: Don't get angry at me.
japanese: 私に腹を立てないで。

english: You don't have to shout at me.
japanese: 私に怒鳴る必要はない。
cloze: You don't have to shout [BLANK] me.

english: He was surprised at the news.
japanese: 彼はその知らせに驚いた。

english: The dog is sniffing at my bag.
japanese: 犬が私のカバンのにおいをくんくんかいでいる。
cloze: The dog is sniffing [BLANK] my bag.

english: Point A at B.
japanese: AをBに向けなさい。

english: Don't point your finger at me.
japanese: 私に指をささないで。

english: He aimed a gun at the target.
japanese: 彼は銃で的を狙った。
cloze: He aimed a gun [BLANK] the target.

english: The hunter shot at a bird.
japanese: 猟師は鳥を狙い撃ちした。

english: Can you make a guess at my age?
japanese: 私の年齢を推測できますか。
cloze: Can you make a guess [BLANK] my age?

english: He caught at the ball.
japanese: 彼はボールに飛びつこうとした。

english: What are you driving at?
japanese: 何を言いたいの？
